name: 09_mc_absent_mc_sanity_irrelevant_magnitude_gates
description: When MC is absent (prob_beating=None), the MC sanity gate in compute_exit_confirmation treats None as pass. The ONLY remaining gate is the magnitude condition. This fixture pins that behaviour: magnitude fails -> no fire, even with multiple prior ticks accumulated.

sequence.description: Return exactly AT the stop level (not below threshold - MAGNITUDE_FLOOR_PCT). Boundary: current_return=-1.0, stop=-1.0. Threshold=-1.10. -1.0 <= -1.10 is FALSE.
sequence.derivation: current_return=-1.0, threshold = -1.0 - 0.10 = -1.10. -1.0 <= -1.10 is FALSE. Magnitude condition fails -> count resets to 0, no fire. A fix that ignores the magnitude floor when MC is absent MUST fail this.

sequence.description: Return exactly at threshold boundary: -1.10 <= -1.10 -> TRUE (inclusive boundary).
sequence.derivation: current_return=-1.1, threshold=-1.10. -1.1 <= -1.10 is TRUE (inclusive). Condition met. count: 0+1=1. Hit=(1>=3)=False.
